meta.title: Bruno Merino — IT Analyst & Developer
meta.description: Custom web development, ERP integrations, process automation and databases. PC repair and support in Cipolletti and Neuquén, Argentina.

hero.tagline: I build custom websites, wire up ERPs, automate workflows and wrangle databases. And when the machine itself acts up, I fix that too.
hero.whatsapp: Give me a shout on WhatsApp

services.heading: Software and hardware, sorted
services.subtitle: Whatever your business or project needs to keep running.

web.title: Custom websites
web.desc: Fast, modern sites built with Next.js — catalogs, landing pages, company sites. From domain to deploy, ready to go.

apps.title: App development
apps.desc: Web and mobile apps, tailor-made — built around how your business actually works.

automation.title: Automation & integrations
automation.desc: I connect your systems, ERP and outside services (n8n, APIs) so the busywork disappears and your data flows on its own.

maintenance.title: PC maintenance
maintenance.desc: Cleanup, optimization and tune-ups to get machines running like new.

repair.title: Diagnosis & repair
repair.desc: Tracking down and fixing hardware and software issues.

build.title: PC builds & advice
build.desc: Personalized part-picking and quotes based on your budget and what you'll use it for — gaming, work or editing.
build.note: Advice available online anywhere in Argentina; on-site builds around Cipolletti and Neuquén.

talk.title: We talk
talk.desc: Tell me what you need and who it's for.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.desc: Clear scope, timeline and budget — no surprises.

build.title: Build
build.desc: I get to work, with progress you can actually see.

deploy.title: Launch
deploy.desc: Your project goes live, up and running.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some recent work — client projects and internal builds.

ranquel.name: El Ranquel
ranquel.desc: Online B2B catalog for a wholesale distributor, so clients and nurseries can browse the full product line quickly and easily.
ranquel.longDesc: A wholesale catalog built so clients and nurseries can find products fast — no account needed. Category browsing, clear product pages and quick loading, whether you're on a desktop or your phone.
highlights: Browse the catalog, no login required
Categories and search that make sense
Looks great on mobile and desktop

hermosilla.name: Julian Hermosilla Abogado
hermosilla.desc: Website for a law firm in Neuquén / Río Negro — a clean, professional presentation of their legal services, built to bring in inquiries.
hermosilla.longDesc: A website for a law firm, presenting their practice areas professionally with a clear focus on turning visitors into inquiries. Clean, fast and designed to build trust from the first click.

fstrack.name: FSTrack
fstrack.desc: Farm-management mobile app for livestock tracking and purchase/sale orders, integrated with the Finnegans GO ERP. Works offline and syncs to the cloud.
fstrack.longDesc: A mobile app for managing livestock activity and purchase/sale orders, integrated with the Finnegans GO ERP. Built for the field: it keeps working with no signal and syncs to the cloud once you're back in range.
highlights: Works offline, syncs when you're back online
Talks to the Finnegans GO ERP via API

nucleogym.name: NucleoGym
nucleogym.desc: An app for tracking gym members' workout routines, with exercise logging and progress over time.
nucleogym.longDesc: An app for trainers and gym-goers to keep track of workout routines: exercises, sets and progress over time. Made to be easy to use right from your phone, mid-workout.

wpp.name: Asistente de WhatsApp con IA
wpp.desc: A conversational assistant that lets employees log hours and manage tickets right from WhatsApp — natural language, voice notes and all. AI wired into the company ERP.
wpp.longDesc: A WhatsApp assistant that lets employees log hours and manage tickets by just… texting, or sending a voice note. Behind the scenes, an AI orchestration (GPT-4o) figures out what they mean and talks to the company ERP.
highlights: Log hours by text or voice note
GPT-4o making sense of natural language
Hooked into the ERP via n8n and APIs

experience.heading: Experience & skills
experience.subtitle: Where I've worked, what I studied and the stack I reach for.

fisterra.desc: Development and implementation on the Finnegans GO ERP: REST API integrations, process automation with n8n, scripting and stored procedures in SQL Server. I also build internal apps (web and mobile) and keep users up and running.

service.desc: Software and hardware maintenance and installation. Diagnostics, optimization and custom PC builds.

maintenance.desc: Software maintenance and computer tune-ups to help people work faster.

analista.title: Higher Technical Degree in Information Systems Analysis

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind, or a computer acting up? Drop me a line and we'll figure it out.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
